{{Infobox location
| name = Zykaros system
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A shipping company is registered out of the [[Zykaros system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zykaros system]] is located one sector away from [[Fathom]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zykaros system]] is the location where [[Veshran]]'s fleet is advancing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
